message:
chore: align session templates with tribunal agents + misc fixes

Session Templates:
- Use TribunalAgentRole type from ./agents instead of duplicate definition
- Update agent lists to use brenner_channeler + synthesis (not moderator)
- Update phase configurations for Literature Review and Design Focus

Fixes:
- Fix __proto__ prototype pollution test pattern in storage.test.ts
- Fix lint error in delta-parser.test.ts (use type narrowing instead of any)
- Update search index files
- Various test expectation updates

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -226,11 +226,12 @@ function stripMarkdown(text: string): string {
     text

-      // Remove italic markers for questions

       // Remove inline code
